mapper.sql: comment_id, post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, image_url, status, like_count, comment_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY comment_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY comment_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 1 ORDER BY comment_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND like_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment ORDER BY comment_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM comment WHERE content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY comment_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
